overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a survival horror game showing a character in a dark coat standing in tall grass at night, facing a distant gothic castle tower surrounded by bare trees and atmospheric fog. The scene features a moody blue color palette with low lighting and misty visibility.

leafless twisted tree with gnarled branches framing the left side of the view

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a foggy forest clearing at night, facing a distant gothic castle tower silhouetted against a cloudy sky. Bare trees frame the scene on both sides while tall grass fills the foreground. A flock of birds flies across the dark sky, and a single warm lantern glows near the castle base, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across a desolate, moonlit forest clearing toward a distant gothic silhouette. It begins with the character standing amidst tall grass, framed by the skeletal branches of bare trees under a heavy, cloudy sky. As the camera lingers on the horizon, a flock of birds cuts across the dark expanse, adding a sense of movement to the oppressive atmosphere. The scene then draws focus toward the distant castle tower, where a single warm lantern glows at the base, creating a sharp contrast against the pervasive cool blue moonlight and swirling fog.
